      • getMaxDurationSeconds

        @Nullable
public Long getMaxDurationSeconds()
        Optional timeout in seconds after startAt. If not all entities match before timeout the test transitions to FAILED. minimum: 1
        Returns:
        maxDurationSeconds

      • setMaxDurationSeconds

        public void setMaxDurationSeconds(@Nullable
                                  Long maxDurationSeconds)

        public CreateDeliverabilityTestOptions successThresholdPercent(@Nullable
                                                               Double successThresholdPercent)

      • getSuccessThresholdPercent

        @Nullable
public Double getSuccessThresholdPercent()
        Optional acceptable success threshold percentage (0,100]. If set, a timed-out test can complete successfully when matchedEntities/totalEntities reaches this percentage. minimum: 0.0 maximum: 100.0
        Returns:
        successThresholdPercent

      • setSuccessThresholdPercent

                                       Double successThresholdPercent)
